button.label: Widescreen
button.supertip: Start a new Widescreen Template (use if a document is being viewed on a screen)

button.label: A4 Landscape
button.supertip: Start a new A4 Landscape Template (use if a document will be printed)

button.label: US Letter
button.supertip: Start a new US Letter Template (use for documents printed in countries using US Letter size paper)

button.label: Margin 0.0
button.supertip: Set margin to 0.0

button.label: Margin 0.1
button.supertip: Set margin to 0.1

button.label: Margin 0.2
button.supertip: Set margin to 0.2

button.label: Custom Margin
button.supertip: Enter custom margin values

button.label: Line Space After 6pt
button.supertip: Set line spacing after to 6pt

button.label: Line Space After 1pt
button.supertip: Set line spacing after to 1pt

button.label: Merge Text Boxes
button.supertip: Merge selected text boxes into one

button.label: Split Text Boxes
button.supertip: Split a text box into multiple parts

button.label: Plain Text Box
button.supertip: Apply text format to the selected box or insert a new text box

menu.label: Insert / Format Strapline
menu.supertip: Insert or format a Strapline to the page

button.label: 1 line Strapline
button.supertip: Insert or format a 1 line Strapline

button.label: 2 line Strapline
button.supertip: Insert or format a 2 line Strapline

button.label: Toggle Wrap Text
button.supertip: Toggle between Wrap text on and off

button.label: Toggle Resize
button.supertip: Toggle between Do not autofit and Resize shape to fit text

button.label: Fill Text Box
button.supertip: Apply text format to the selected box or insert a new text box

button.label: Insert key, note, source
button.supertip: Insert a key, note or source to the page

button.label: Insert fullstops
button.supertip: Insert fullstops to the end of paragraphs

button.label: No Fill
button.supertip: Remove the fill of the selected shape

button.label: No Outline
button.supertip: Remove the outline of the selected shape

control.label: Font Color
control.supertip: Change the colour of your text

button.label: Select Same Fill
button.supertip: Select all objects with the same fill colour

button.label: Select Same Outline
button.supertip: Select all objects with the same outline colour

button.label: Select Same Width
button.supertip: Select all objects with the same width

button.label: Select Same Height
button.supertip: Select all objects with the same height

button.label: Swap Positions
button.supertip: Swap the positions of two selected objects

button.label: Copy Position
button.supertip: Copy the position of a selected object

button.label: Paste Position
button.supertip: Paste the copied position to another object

button.label: Align Left
button.supertip: Align objects to the left

button.label: Align Right
button.supertip: Align objects to the right

button.label: Align Top
button.supertip: Align objects to the top

button.label: Align Bottom
button.supertip: Align objects to the bottom

button.label: Align Centre
button.supertip: Align objects to the centre

button.label: Align Middle
button.supertip: Align objects to the middle

button.label: Distribute Horizontal
button.supertip: Distribute objects horizontally

button.label: Distribute Vertical
button.supertip: Distribute objects vertically

button.label: Same Width
button.supertip: Make objects the same width as the first one selected

button.label: Same Height
button.supertip: Make objects the same height as the first one selected

button.label: Same Width and Height
button.supertip: Make objects the same width and height as the first one selected

button.label: Unrotate objects
button.supertip: Reset shape rotation, swap size, keep position

button.label: Touch Top
button.supertip: Align objects to the top of the first box

button.label: Touch Bottom
button.supertip: Align objects to the bottom of the first box

button.label: Touch Left
button.supertip: Align objects to the left of the first box

button.label: Touch Right
button.supertip: Align objects to the right of the first box

button.label: Right Space Adjustment
button.supertip: Stacks selected boxes with adjustable spacing (in cm) between each, keeping the first on the left

button.label: Bottom Space Adjustment
button.supertip: Stacks selected boxes with adjustable spacing (in cm) between each, keeping the first at the top

button.label: Format Table
button.supertip: Apply formatting to the selected tables

button.label: Add Table Title
button.supertip: Add a title above the selected tables

button.label: Table Text Formatter
button.supertip: Format text in selected table with customisable font size

button.label: Banded Rows
button.supertip: Apply banded rows to table

button.label: Banded Columns
button.supertip: Apply banded columns to table

button.label: Highlight Cells
button.supertip: Highlight selected cells in a table with an orange outline

button.label: Horizontal Divider
button.supertip: Add a horizontal divider line underneath the selected cells

button.label: Vertical Divider
button.supertip: Add a vertical divider line to the right of the selected cells

button.label: Total Row(s)
button.supertip: Format the selected rows in the correct total format

menu.label: Consistent Columns
menu.supertip: Copy the width of columns from one table to another

button.label: Copy Column Widths
button.supertip: Copy the column widths of the selected table

button.label: Apply Column Widths
button.supertip: Apply the stored column widths to the selected tables

button.label: Table Margin
button.supertip: Set 0.15cm margins on tables

button.label: Custom Table Margin
button.supertip: Set custom margins for a table

button.label: Copy Table Margin
button.supertip: Copy the margin settings of a table

button.label: Paste Table Margin
button.supertip: Paste margin settings of a table

button.label: Format Graph
button.supertip: Apply formatting to the selected graphs

button.label: Add Chart Title
button.supertip: Add a tile above the selected graph

button.label: Chart Text Formatter
button.supertip: Format text in selected charts with customisable font size

button.label: Colour Series
button.supertip: Apply Aon colours to all the series in your graph

button.label: Find Embeded Graphs
button.supertip: Finds the graphs that are embedded into the file

button.label: Unembed Graph
button.supertip: Unembed the selected graph to reduce file size

button.label: Copy Graph Link
button.supertip: SHow and copy the file path of a graph if it is linked

menu.label: Graph Guides
menu.supertip: Open Graph Guides for your template

button.label: Widescreen Guides
button.supertip: Open Graph Guides for the Widescreen Template

button.label: A4 Guides
button.supertip: Open Graph Guides for the A4 Template

button.label: US Guides
button.supertip: Open Graph Guides for the US Letter Template

button.label: Insert Note
button.supertip: Insert a note

button.label: Set UK English
button.supertip: Set language to UK English

button.label: Set US English
button.supertip: Set language to US English

button.label: Set Document Title
button.supertip: Set the document title to be the same as the file name

button.label: Delete Comments
button.supertip: Delete all comments in the document

button.label: Remove Slide Notes
button.supertip: Remove all slide notes in the document

button.label: Find Large Images
button.supertip: Finds all the images in the PPT file

button.label: Find Embedded Spreadsheets
button.supertip: Finds all the Excel spreadsheets that are embedded into the PPT file

button.label: Extra colours
button.supertip: Open extra colours PPT file

button.label: Break Table
button.supertip: Create text boxes for all cells of the selected table

menu.label: Insert Elements
menu.supertip: Insert most used elements to the page

button.label: Insert Bracket
button.supertip: Insert a Square Bracket to the page

button.label: Insert Chevron
button.supertip: Insert a Chevron to the page

button.label: Insert Big Stat
button.supertip: Insert a Big stat to the page

button.label: Insert Little Stat
button.supertip: Insert a Little stat to the page

button.label: Insert Quote
button.supertip: Insert a Quote to the page

menu.label: Page Status
menu.supertip: Mark the document as, ready for design, on still being worked on, or complete

button.label: Ready for Design
button.supertip: Mark the slide as ready for design

button.label: Still Being Worked On
button.supertip: Mark the slide as still being worked on

button.label: Complete
button.supertip: Mark the slide as complete
